page_metadata.biotools__summary: VirtUaL ChIP-Seq Analysis through Networks is a package that interrogates gene regulatory networks to infer cofactors significantly enriched in a differential binding signature coming from ChIP-Seq data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: VirtUaL ChIP-Seq Analysis through Networks is a package that interrogates gene regulatory networks to infer cofactors significantly enriched in a differential binding signature coming from ChIP-Seq data.
